entities.description: Collections of plant genetic resources kept outside their natural habitat)

entities.description: Large collections of genetic material established at ICRISAT genebank)

entities.name: ECONOMIC TRAITS
entities.description: Traits whose lack of information has led to exiguous use of germplasm in breeding programs)

entities.name: CORE COLLECTIONS
entities.description: Collections developed to enhance the use of germplasm in breeding programs)

entities.name: MINI CORE COLLECTIONS
entities.description: Smaller collections developed to enhance the use of germplasm in breeding programs)

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAMS
entities.description: Programs that use core and mini core collections to develop broad based cultivars)

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES

entities.description: Traits evaluated in core and mini core collections for use in breeding programs)

entities.description: Cultivars developed using genetically diverse trait specific germplasm)

entities.description: The variety of genetic characteristics within a species)
